name: codersteroids
description: Coding-agent methodology with Context7 research, living roadmaps, Markdown wiki memory, and benchmark discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Context7-backed planning, roadmap, verification, and LLM Wiki memory for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: CoderSteroids guides coding agents to research current documentation before using external APIs, keep a written roadmap and plan, maintain Markdown wiki memory, document folder responsibilities, package context for subagents, verify delegated work, and benchmark against Superpowers before claiming superiority.
defaultPrompt: Continue from the roadmap and wiki memory.
